name: Renegade Rush
short_description: Renegade Rush is a survivor-style roguelike featuring deep upgrade systems, strategic exploration, and dynamic weapon builds. Stay aware of your position in the universe—venture out to hunt and discover, but don’t stray too far from home unless you're prepared for the dangers ahead.
detailed_description:
The last independent civilization has poured all its resources into creating a technological marvel—a final stand against the Empire. You are the sole pilot on a hunt.

Time is of the essence. Your mission: swiftly gather resources to enhance your ship, eliminate key personnel within the Empire's ranks, and, if fortune favors you, take down the Emperor himself.

  • Gather valuable intel on alien technology to strengthen your cause.

  • Complete bounties on the Empire’s generals to disrupt enemy operations.

  • Search for natural resources in space and on uncharted planets.

But don’t get ahead of yourself. The longer you remain in enemy territory, the greater the resistance you’ll face. Your home planet remains a safe haven—for now. Venture too far, and the danger will only escalate.

Renegade Rush features a variety of upgrade systems, multiple currencies, and plenty of ways to earn them. The challenge gradually increases as you travel farther from your home planet and time progresses. Along the way, you’ll encounter mini-bosses known as Bounties—and maybe even discover a few surprises of your own.
